commits.author: Linx-RW
lines: Flipped detailFadeInStart and detailFadeInEnd to better represent how the parameters work.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: Add ocean height info to physics debug displays.

commits.author: gravhoek-rw
lines: First cut of putting vehicles on rails when splashed down on dynamic waves. This works well in most situations but breaks if you swap to a vehicle in orbit of the same celestial because the wave height sampler returns erratic answers - need to solve this case.
Added two new vehicle situations: sailing and floating.

commits.author: Morrow
lines: Added the first main fuel tank part and engine part.
Added both new parts to the default gemini.

commits.author: Dan Southon
lines: Changed the normals used for lighting in the mesh shader

commits.author: JPLRepoRocketwerkz
lines: Fixed issue where the show/hide orbit lines toggles were not being respected correctly and was dependant on the parent bodies setting to show orbit lines or not.
Fixed issue where duplicate burns were being generated by one click.
Fixed issue where subsequent burns being added after a previous one that has no delta-V was causing the burn to not be added and errors being written to console.
